name: Nicolásek
description: Nicolas: straight light-blond hair, bright blue eyes, white T-shirt with two red horizontal stripes, mid-blue denim shorts, white sneakers with grey soles, tall boy

name: Valentýnka
description: Valentýna: wavy light-blonde hair with large pink fabric bow, sky-blue eyes, yellow dress with small white flower print and white collar, white sandals, very small — roughly half Nicolas's height

name: Táta Jan
description: Jan: adult man with very short light-brown hair, short grey-brown stubble beard, warm smile, navy-blue polo shirt with white horizontal stripes, navy shorts, tall athletic build

name: Máma Jana
description: Jana: adult woman with very long straight blonde hair, blue-grey eyes, gentle smile, lilac-purple hoodie with drawstrings, black leggings, slim medium height

name: Pes Archie
description: Archie: friendly Staffordshire Bull Terrier dog, red-brindle brown coat with white chest and white stripe on the muzzle, white paws, black collar with brass studs, stocky muscular build, happy expression with tongue out
